lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
The vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear on the interior or exterior. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order and the car functions as new.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear on the interior or exterior. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order and the car has been meticulously maintained.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It currently requires significant mechanical repairs; the engine is idling roughly, and there is a persistent transmission fluid leak that needs immediate attention. The exterior shows heavy wear with visible rust on the quarter panels, several large dents, and extensive peeling of the clear coat. Inside, the upholstery is heavily torn, and most of the electronics, including the radio and air conditioning, are non-functional. This car is recommended only as a parts vehicle or a serious project for someone with extensive mechanical expertise.

Check out this great opportunity to own a reliable vehicle at an affordable price! This car is in fair condition and ready to hit the road. It shows some honest wear and tear from its adventures, with a few cosmetic imperfections and signs of use throughout. However, it remains a solid, functional ride that offers fantastic value for anyone looking for dependable transportation without the high price tag. Come take a look!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-cared for. The exterior is clean with only minor signs of use, such as a few light surface scratches and tiny stone chips on the hood. Inside, the cabin is tidy and the upholstery is in great shape with no tears or major stains. Mechanically, the car runs smoothly and has a consistent service history, making it a dependable and attractive choice for its next owner.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been preserved with meticulous attention to detail and an uncompromising maintenance standard. Its aesthetic and mechanical integrity are absolute, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. A premier acquisition for the most discerning client.

Hi everyone! I’m looking for a new home for my beautiful car, and I promise you won’t find another one quite like this! It’s in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels just like it did the day I bought it.

Presenting an investment-grade 2006 BMW M3 ZCP, finished in Interlagos Blue. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, recently serviced with documented rod bearing replacement and a comprehensive Beisan Systems VANOS overhaul. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission to a variable M-differential lock. The chassis remains factory-true with proactive subframe reinforcement. Suspension geometry is optimized via the Competition Package’s quicker steering rack and upgraded dampers. Every bushing is pliable, the throttle response from the individual throttle bodies is razor-sharp, and the Alcantara-wrapped cockpit shows zero bolster wear. This is a turn-key, mechanically superlative specimen for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Zero flaws. Showroom quality. Clean title. No accidents.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in absolute showroom condition. The exterior paint retains its original deep luster with zero imperfections, scratches, or swirl marks, while the interior remains factory-fresh, featuring supple, unmarked leather and that distinctive new-car scent. Mechanically, it is flawless, having been meticulously garaged and serviced exclusively by certified specialists with a full paper trail included. Every detail, from the pristine engine bay to the untouched undercarriage, reflects a level of care rarely seen outside of a museum. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that drives as perfectly as it looks.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest professional standards. This unit exhibits an impeccable exterior finish paired with a pristine, showroom-grade interior. Mechanically superior and aesthetically flawless, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands uncompromising quality. Every detail has been meticulously scrutinized to ensure it meets our most rigorous criteria for excellence.

Presenting a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical integrity, reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. An opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a truly pristine example of automotive excellence.

Hey there! 🚗 You have to see this absolute beauty. It’s in pristine, showroom-quality condition and honestly looks like it was just driven off the lot for the first time! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for perfection on wheels, this is your lucky day! Come say hi and take it for a spin!

Offering an impeccable example of the E46 chassis, powered by the S54 3.2L inline-six featuring individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double VANOS variable valve timing. This vehicle remains in museum-grade condition, maintaining factory-spec compression and a razor-sharp 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag six-speed manual gearbox provides precise engagement, complemented by a perfectly functioning M-Variable limited-slip differential. Structural integrity is guaranteed with proactive subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension featuring Bilstein damping. Every mechanical component, from the cross-drilled rotors to the staggered forged wheels, reflects a standard of preservation rarely seen. This is a turn-key opportunity for the discerning purist to own a masterpiece of naturally aspirated performance.
Mint condition. Clean title. Single owner. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Inspection ready.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in a state that rivals its original debut on the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely no swirl marks, chips, or imperfections, while the interior remains in pristine condition with supple, unscuffed leather and a factory-fresh scent. Every mechanical component has been meticulously maintained, backed by a comprehensive service history that documents a life of preventative care and climate-controlled storage. From the crystal-clear lenses to the immaculate engine bay and spotless undercarriage, this car reflects the highest standard of ownership. It drives exactly as it did the day it left the factory—tight, responsive, and completely silent. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to acquire a truly flawless example of automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in showroom-grade condition. Meticulously maintained and reflecting the highest standards of automotive care, this unit offers an unparalleled combination of mechanical integrity and aesthetic perfection. For the discerning buyer seeking a definitive example of this model, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a pristine asset with an impeccable pedigree.

Presenting an exceptional example of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and showing no signs of wear, it offers an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning collector. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic perfection define the highest standard for pre-owned luxury.

Hey there! I’m absolutely thrilled to show you this stunning ride. Honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered since day one—garage-kept, smoke-free, and meticulously cared for. If you’re looking for a car that’s basically brand new without the dealership price tag, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This collector-grade FD3S RX-7 exemplifies mechanical purity. Power is delivered via the legendary 13B-REW rotary engine, featuring a sequential twin-turbocharger setup that holds factory-spec boost throughout the rev range. The chassis maintains its original structural rigidity, complemented by a perfectly balanced 50/50 weight distribution and a double-wishbone suspension geometry that remains tight and responsive. The five-speed manual transmission provides crisp engagement, feeding power through a Torsen limited-slip differential. Every
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Spotless interior. All maintenance records available.

Presented in showroom condition, this vehicle is a true collector’s dream. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, scratches, or swirl marks, while the interior remains preserved in its original state, still carrying that distinct new-car aroma. Every surface, from the supple hand-stitched leather seating to the pristine, crack-free dashboard, is absolutely flawless. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach; it has been meticulously maintained with a full authorized service history and has been strictly garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment. It drives as tightly and smoothly as the day it rolled off the assembly line. Complete with all original manuals, two keys, and a documented pedigree, this is quite simply the finest example of its kind currently available on the market.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained in showroom condition. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved, exhibiting flawless aesthetics and mechanical integrity that satisfy the most discerning collector. A rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar of such uncompromising caliber.

Presenting a definitive example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in impeccable condition, having been maintained to the highest standards of preservation. Every surface, from the flawless coachwork to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a commitment to quality that is increasingly rare. This is an investment-grade specimen for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You’ve seriously got to see this beauty. It’s in absolutely pristine condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken incredible care of it, and it's ready for its next adventure. You won’t find another one this clean. Come take it for a spin!

Offering a concours-grade 2002 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six. This specimen is mechanically superlative, boasting six individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline delivered through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis integrity is absolute; the rear subframe has been proactively reinforced, and the dual-VANOS system has been overhauled to ensure peak variable valve timing performance. It retains its factory-spec suspension geometry and M Variable Differential Lock for uncompromising lateral dynamics. Finished in impeccable Carbon Black over Cinnamon Nappa leather, the aesthetic condition matches its mechanical excellence, showing no bolster wear or paint imperfections. A turn-key acquisition for the purist demanding a pinnacle analog driving experience.
Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No cosmetic or mechanical issues. Showroom condition.

This exceptional vehicle represents a rare opportunity to own a true showroom-quality specimen. The exterior is finished in a deep, lustrous coat that has been meticulously maintained, showing no signs of stone chips, swirl marks, or door dings. Every panel gap is factory-perfect, and the alloy wheels remain entirely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather upholstery is supple and devoid of creases, while the carpets have been protected since day one. All electronic components, from the high-fidelity sound system to the climate control, operate with precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a comprehensive service history and a climate-controlled storage environment. It delivers a driving experience that is as tight, quiet, and responsive as the day it was first delivered. For the buyer who demands perfection and a vehicle that looks and feels brand new, this is the definitive choice.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been curated to an exacting standard, remaining in pristine, showroom condition. Every facet of its presentation reflects a commitment to uncompromising preservation, offering a definitive acquisition for the most discerning enthusiast. A rare opportunity to secure a vehicle of investment-grade quality.
